cmd_reload_plugins: reload script plugins from disk without restarting
cmd_yolo: bypass permission prompts for a chosen duration
perm_hint: ← → or Tab to select · Enter to confirm · Esc to deny
yolo_title: ⚡ UNSAFE MODE — All tool calls will be auto-approved.
yolo_subtitle: Select how long bypass mode should stay active:
yolo_hint: ← → or Tab to select · Enter to confirm · Esc to cancel
lang_hint: ← → or Tab to select · Enter to confirm · Esc to cancel
yolo_active_timed: ⚡ Bypass mode active for {{.Duration}} — all tool calls auto-approved until {{.Until}}
yolo_active_session: ⚡ Bypass mode active for this session — all tool calls auto-approved
yolo_expired: ✓ Bypass mode expired — safe mode restored
config_save_failed: configuration applied but could not be saved: {{.Error}}
wizard_nav_hint: Navigate with Enter / Shift+Tab to go back. Ctrl+C to quit.
wizard_provider_desc: Which AI provider should FEINO use?
wizard_workdir_desc: Root directory the agent will use as its base.
anthropic_model_desc: Models available on your Anthropic account. Fetching…
openai_key_desc: Starts with sk-. Required even for local proxies.
openai_baseurl_desc: Override for local proxies or Azure OpenAI. Leave blank for api.openai.com.
openai_model_desc: Models available on your OpenAI account. Fetching…
gemini_vertex_desc:
Use Vertex AI (Application Default Credentials) instead of an API key.
Requires a GCP project — leave off to use AI Studio with an API key.
gemini_key_desc: Get yours at aistudio.google.com. Stored in ~/.feino/config.yaml (mode 0600).
gemini_project_desc: The Google Cloud project that has the Vertex AI API enabled.
gemini_model_desc: Models available on your Gemini account. Fetching…
ollama_host_desc: Leave blank to use the default local server.
ollama_model_select_desc: Models available in your local Ollama instance.
ollama_model_input_desc: Enter a model name (run `ollama pull <name>` to download it).
compat_baseurl_desc: Root of the OpenAI-compatible API, e.g. http://localhost:8000/v1
compat_key_desc: Leave blank for servers that do not require authentication.
compat_name_desc: Label shown in the TUI, e.g. "My vLLM". Defaults to OpenAI-Compatible.
compat_model_desc: Models reported by the endpoint. Fetching…
models_unavailable: ⚠ Could not load models ({{.Reason}}) — press Ctrl+C to abort
validation_url_format: must start with http:// or https://
input_placeholder: type a message or /command… (Enter sends, Ctrl+J for newline)
wizard_profile_desc: Help FEINO personalise responses. All fields are optional — press Enter to skip.
wizard_profile_tz_desc: IANA timezone, e.g. America/New_York. Used for time-aware answers.
profile_memories_hint: Use memory_write / memory_update / memory_forget to manage memories.
theme_hint: ← → or Tab to select · Enter to confirm · Esc to cancel
cmd_profile: show your user profile and agent memories
setup_cancelled:
Setup cancelled.
Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, GEMINI_API_KEY, or OPENAI_COMPAT_BASE_URL to skip the wizard.
